name: logseq-pomodoro-timer
description: Pomodoro focus/break timer with task time tracking for Logseq DB.

logseq.title: Pomodoro task manager
logseq.description: Pomodoro focus/break cycles with per-task time tracking. Modifier-gated task tracking, drag-and-drop reordering, status circle picker, and daily 🍅 count.
